title: senecio benaventianus
intro: Senecio benaventianus, also known as Spanish ragwort, is a plant species in the daisy family native to the Iberian Peninsula. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Senecio benaventianus include its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve respiratory issues, and support digestion. Senecio benaventianus can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to alleviate symptoms of coughs, colds, and other minor health complaints.
